projects.name: freightbid_agent
projects.description: Hybrid AI decision system for freight dispatch. Combines rule-based optimization, ML prediction, and agent planning to recommend profitable loads, minimize deadhead, and generate bid strategies for hotshot trucking. Built as an AI engineering portfolio project with real-world constraints.
